# What's the Output?

::: notes
Total slides: 4
:::

<!-- Slide 1 -->

---

## The Code

```cpp
// inputs: 0, 4, 5, 2
#include <iostream>
using namespace std;

int main() {
    int val;
    cin >> val;

    if (val >= 1 && val <= 4) {
        cout << "Valid: " << val << endl;
    } else {
        cout << "Invalid" << endl;
    }

    return 0;
}
```
::: notes
NO LOOP!
::: 

<!-- Slide 2 -->

---

## Output


::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="75%"}

```{.cpp} 
// inputs: 0, 4, 5, 2
#include <iostream>
using namespace std;

int main() {
    int val;
    cin >> val;

    if (val >= 1 && val <= 4) {
        cout << "Valid: " << val << endl;
    } else {
        cout << "Invalid" << endl;
    }

    return 0;
}
```
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}

```{.cpp} 
/*
Input: 0
Output: "Invalid"
*/
```

:::
::: 

<!-- Slide 3 -->
